\tzpentry{ID4118}{Pswitch Pressure Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4118 introduces Pswitch Pressure Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$Pswitch(s)=\sigma(\alpha(\pi(s-1)-\phi c))=11+exp[-\alpha(\pi(s-1)-\phi c)]$
\]
